headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Fox (FOXA) After A 104% Three Year Return?
summary: For investors considering whether Fox at around US$62.23 still offers value or if the easy money has already been made, this breakdown is designed to help frame that question clearly. The stock has had a mixed recent run, with a 1.5% decline over the last week, a 6.2% gain over the last month, and returns of 26.8% over 1 year, 104.0% over 3 years, and 72.4% over 5 years, while being 15.6% lower year to date. Recent headlines around Fox have focused on the business as a core media player in...
